name: Puffed Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Add wings to marinade for at least one hour.
2. Combine dry ingredients (cornstarch, flour, baking powder) in a bowl. Stir in egg and milk until well mixed.
3. Pat the wings dry with paper towels.
4. Dip each wing into the batter, allowing excess to drip off.
5. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy-duty pot to 350°F (175°C).
6. Fry the wings in batches of 3-4 for 3-4 minutes per batch until golden brown and crispy.
